notes: Major content drop: SKILL TREE. 5 archetype branches × 8 nodes — Vanguard (tank), Skirmisher (dash), Carrier (drones), Spectre (crit), Prism (beam). 1 SP per match + 3 per win. Allocate in the new SKILL TREE menu tab; respec 25 SURGE flat. Visual mutators stack — ship grows halos, satellites, layered chevrons, hex casing, spike decals. Hitbox locked regardless of visuals. Also: second-match double-bot leak fixed (player+bot were never queue_freed during _clear_world).
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
